2.Before plugging in the water heater power cord into an outlet, be sure the system is completely charged with water and all air is removed.

4.Before servicing or cleaning the water heater, disconnect the power cord from the electrical outlet.
5.DO NOT Tamper with the reset button to override overheating shut down.
6.Please read the instruction manual carefully before you install or using the water heater!

## Camplux Pro 6L: Instant Hot Water for Your Adventures

The Camplux Pro 6L, a 1.58 GPM outdoor portable propane tankless water heater, offers a convenient and efficient solution for on-demand hot water in various settings. This unit, paired with a 1.2 GPM water pump, is designed for ease of use and safety, making it an ideal choice for campers, cabin dwellers, and those seeking hot water in remote locations.

### Effortless Setup and Operation

Getting instant hot water is a breeze with the Camplux Pro 6L. The unit provides 1.58 gallons per minute of hot water, and its thoughtful design means you won't need to purchase extra accessories. The package includes two extension hoses and fittings, along with a complete pump package, ensuring a straightforward installation.

### Low Water Pressure Performance

A standout feature of this propane tankless water heater is its ability to operate with as little as 3.0 PSI of water pressure. This low-pressure capability makes it perfectly suited for camping trips and remote cabins where water pressure might be limited. The Camplux Pro 6L is versatile, finding applications in rural areas, RVs, and boats.

### Safety First: CSA Standards and Protection Features

Your family's safety is paramount, and the Camplux Pro 6L is built with this in mind, adhering to CSA standards. It incorporates a flame failure device that automatically shuts off the gas supply if the flame is extinguished. For added protection, it features over-heating protection, with the gas supply automatically cutting off if the water temperature exceeds 167°F. Furthermore, the anti-freezing protection, through an anti-freezing drain plug, allows for the discharge of residual water, preventing freezing in cold climates and ensuring long-term maintenance.

### Power Efficiency and Energy Savings

The Camplux Pro 6L boasts a maximum power output of 41,000 BTU/hour, delivering instant and endless hot water wherever you need it. Its compact and lightweight design is complemented by 11.5% energy-saving technology. The water heater's exchanger and main burner are engineered with advanced combustion technology, which not only reduces gas consumption but also minimizes burning noise.

### Important Usage Guidelines

To ensure safe and optimal operation, it's crucial to follow these important tips. To prevent gas leakage caused by improper sealing, **do not twine Teflon tape between the gas regulator and the gas inlet pipe.** Improper operation can lead to the tankless water heater "catching on fire." Always check for gas leaks before operating the unit.

### Detailed Specifications and Applications

The Camplux BD158 is an excellent choice for a variety of locations, including tiny houses, cabins, lodges, apartments, outdoor showers, boat houses, and campsites. It can also be utilized in fifth wheels, RVs, or campers, provided there is adequate space for proper combustion air and venting, and a flue pipe is installed additionally (flue pipe not included).

Ignition is powered by two D-cell batteries, eliminating the need for external electricity. The ideal low water pressure operating range for the Camplux BD158 is between 2.8 and 110.0 PSI, ensuring easy operation with great performance. The unit operates on propane gas at 0.4 PSI with a maximum power output of 41,000 BTU/hour. The system is also compatible with a 12-volt pump to achieve desired water pressure. It is important to note that this gas water heater is not intended for drinking water. Forgetting to insert the gasket into the adapter before connecting the regulator to the heater can result in gas leaks or even fire.

### Simple Steps to Instant Hot Water

1.  **Mount the Heater:** Hang the gas water heater using the provided handle or install it securely on a wall.
2.  **Connect Gas Supply:** Connect your gas cylinder using the supplied gas hose and regulator.
3.  **Attach Shower Fixtures:** Connect the shower hose and shower head to the hot water outlet.
4.  **Connect Water Inlet:** Attach your water hose to the water inlet.
5.  **Insert Batteries:** Insert two "D" cell batteries for ignition.
6.  **Enjoy:** Experience the convenience of instant hot water!

### What's Included in the Box

*   1 x Camplux Pro Portable Hot Water System
*   1 x 1.2 GPM Water Pump
*   1 x 3-setting ON/OFF Shower Head and Pedestal
*   1 x 5 ft Premium Shower Hose
*   1 x 5 ft CSA Approval Gas Hose & Regulator
*   1 x Garden Hose: 1/2" BSP Female x 3/4" GHT Female
*   1 x Garden Hose: 1/2" BSP Female x 3/4" GHT Male
*   1 x Gas Inlet Connector: 1/2" BSP Female x 5/8" NPT Inverted Flare Male
*   1 x Accessories Package (includes water tape & screws)
*   1 x Instruction Manual

For inquiries and after-sales service, please contact support@camplux.com or call our service hotline at (1)844-538-7475.

Name: Hike Crew Portable Propane Water Heater & Shower Pump – Compact Outdoor Cleaning & Showering System w/LCD & Auto Safety Shutoff for Instant Hot Water While Camping, Hiking – Carry Case Included Description: List of features: PORTABLE OUTDOOR WATER HEATER – Innovative System Runs on Propane Gas Tank to Heat Water for Showering, Washing Dishes, Cleaning Hands & Other Tasks COMFORTABLE CAMPSITE SHOWERS – Includes Water Temperature Control Knob, Hand Faucet/Spigot & Shower Head Attachment w/ [3] Adjustable Spray Patterns PUMP & HEAT ON-THE-GO – Connect AC/DC Adapter to Outlet or 12V Cigarette Lighter to Car for Instant Hot Water; Perfect for Camping, Fishing, Hiking & Hunting AUTOMATIC SAFETY SHUTOFF – Smart Technology Turns Off the Gas Burner When Water Reaches 125°F; Water Flow Sensor & Fuse & Tilt Protection for Added Safety CONVENIENT COMPACT DESIGN – Travel Friendly Heater Arrives With Adapters, Hoses, Attachments & Accessories in a Handy Carry Bag [Propane Not Included] Details: Full Features List

- Water Heater and Shower System: Uses propane gas and AC/DC or 12V power adapter to heat water for use while camping, hiking, fishing and more
- Digital Panel Control: Allows you to power the unit on/off, start the pump and monitor precise water temperate; also indicates ignition and cutout status
- Gas/Heat Control: Stepless knob allows you to adjust water temperature from low to high; located on the top of the heater
- Gas Regulator: Attaches to the top of the propane gas tank and into the gas inlet at the rear of the appliance
- Showerhead Attachment: Plugs into the faucet outlet on the back of the unit to convert spigot into handheld showerhead
- Flow Switch: Allows you to stop and start water flow from the showerhead
- Spray Pattern Control: Switches between 1 of 3 unique spray patterns
- Exhaust Panels: Located on each side of the unit to safely expel hot air
- Water Inlet: Receives the hose pump to feed water into the system from bucket or other reservoir (never use water from a pool, lake, ocean, etc.)
- Faucet Outlet: Provides steady stream of water via spigot for hand washing or filling a receptacle; also connects to showerhead attachment
- Faucet Flow Control: Adjusts to increase or decrease the water flow; also affects temperature as water passes slowly or rapidly over the burner
- AC/DC Adapter: Plugs into standard outdoor generator or RV outlet to provide power to the unit; interchangeable with 12V DC power adapter
- 12V DC Power Adapter: Plugs into car cigarette lighter to provide power to the unit; interchangeable with AC/DC adapter
- High Temperature Sensor: Automatically disables the burner once the water temperature from the dispenser reaches 125°F (52°C)
- Carry Case: Stores the main unit, attachments and adapters

## ECOTOUCH 5.5kW Electric Tankless Water Heater: Instant Hot Water for Your Home

This document details the features and specifications of the ECOTOUCH 5.5kW, 240V electric tankless water heater, a point-of-use hot water solution designed for efficiency and convenience. With its digital display and self-modulating technology, this unit provides on-demand hot water while prioritizing safety and durability.

### Instant and Abundant Hot Water

The ECOTOUCH tankless water heater is equipped with a powerful 5.5kW heating system, engineered to deliver instant, consistent, and endless hot water. Users can expect water temperatures of 116°F or higher within seconds of turning on the tap, eliminating the frustrating wait for preheating and the common issue of fluctuating temperatures. This makes it an ideal companion for sinks, providing a superior hot water experience compared to traditional "lukewarm" alternatives.

### Smart Self-Modulating Technology for Optimal Efficiency

A key innovation of this electric instant hot water heater is its smart self-adjustment capability. The unit intelligently modulates its power input in real-time, responding to both the water flow rate and the desired temperature setting. For instance, when the water flow is reduced, the system automatically applies less power. This ensures that users consistently receive their ideal water temperature without the risk of scalding, leading to a more comfortable and enjoyable experience. This advanced technology contributes to an impressive energy efficiency rating of 98%, translating into significant savings on electricity bills.

### User-Friendly Design and Controls

The tankless water heater boasts a user-friendly interface, featuring a clear digital display and an intuitive touch control panel. Setting the desired water temperature is a straightforward process, allowing users to simply turn on the tap and let the smart unit manage the rest. This eliminates the need for complex adjustments often associated with mixer taps that lack clear temperature indicators. For added convenience, the black model includes a remote control, which is particularly useful when the unit is installed in a less accessible location, such as under a sink.

### Robust Safety Features and Durable Construction

Safety and longevity are paramount in the design of the ECOTOUCH tankless water heater. The unit is outfitted with multiple protection devices, and each unit undergoes rigorous testing to ensure 100% safety. The internal water and electricity lines are designed to run separately, effectively preventing potential leakage and mitigating the risks associated with scale buildup. The ECOTOUCH unit has received approval from ETL and qualifies for UL certification, underscoring its commitment to outstanding performance and reliability for years to come.

### Compact Point-of-Use Installation

The sleek and compact design of this tankless water heater, comparable in size to an oatmeal box, allows for versatile installation in virtually any location close to the hot water outlet. This point-of-use capability minimizes energy waste by heating water only when needed and directly at the source. The unit can be mounted horizontally, vertically, or obliquely, making it an ideal solution for various settings including kitchens, bars, schools, hospitals, community centers, and hair salons.

**Key Specifications:**

*   **Power:** 5.5kW
*   **Voltage:** 240V~60Hz
*   **Minimum Water Flow to Activate:** 0.475 GPM
*   **Maximum Temperature Rise:** From 67°F to 109°F @ 1.2 GPM
*   **Maximum Amperage:** 23A
*   **Recommended Wire Size:** 10AWG
*   **Required Circuit Breaker:** 1x 2-Pole 30 AMP
*   **Dimensions:** 11" x 7.5" x 2.35"
*   **Pipe Fittings:** 1/2" NPT

**Important Considerations:**

*   This unit is primarily designed for sink applications and is not recommended for shower use.
*   Professional installation of the tankless water heater is advised.
*   Please carefully read the instruction manual prior to installation and use.

**Package Includes:**

*   1x ECOTOUCH 5.5kW Instant Water Heater
*   1x Instruction Manual
*   1x Installation Accessories
*   1x Remote Control (for Black model)

## GASLAND Outdoors BS158: Your Portable Propane Tankless Water Heater Solution

Experience the convenience of on-demand hot water with the GASLAND Outdoors BS158, a 1.58 GPM, 6-liter portable gas water heater designed for ultimate flexibility. This instant propane water heater is perfect for RVs, camping, and outdoor use, providing endless hot water wherever you need it.

### Instant Hot Water, Anytime, Anywhere

The GASLAND Outdoors BS158 delivers a powerful 41,000 BTU/hour output, ensuring you get instant, endless hot water without any preheating. Simply turn on the tap, and enjoy water at your desired temperature. This tankless water heater operates efficiently even at low water pressures, requiring as little as 2.5 PSI to start. With a flow rate of 1.58 gallons per minute, you can fully adjust both heat and water flow to suit your needs.

### Uncompromising Safety Features

Safety is paramount with the GASLAND Outdoors BS158. This CSA-approved unit meets Canadian and US safety standards. It is equipped with a flame failure device, anti-freezing protection, and overheating protection to ensure family safety. The water pressure automatically adjusts between 2.5 and 110 PSI. For added protection in colder climates or during periods of non-use, the anti-freezing drain plug allows for the discharge of residual water, preventing freezing. The unit also features high water temperature protection, shutting off the gas supply automatically if the temperature exceeds 167°F.

### Lightweight and Portable Design

Designed for life on the go, the GASLAND Outdoors BS158 boasts a compact and lightweight structure, making it incredibly easy to carry. Enjoy a refreshing hot shower while camping, at the beach, or even for washing pets outdoors. The integrated mounting bracket on the top or back of the unit allows for simple hanging. Installation is a breeze, typically taking just a few minutes, or you can follow the provided instructions for a more permanent setup.

### Energy-Efficient Operation

This propane water heater is engineered with 11.5% energy-saving technology. The advanced combustion technology used in the exchanger and main burner of the GASLAND Outdoors BS158 reduces gas consumption and minimizes burning noise. This means you'll save more on energy costs while enjoying the benefits of continuous hot water.

### Dedicated Customer Support

GASLAND Outdoors is committed to providing excellent customer service. A professional team is available to assist you with any questions or concerns from Monday to Friday.

**Product Details:** Propane Tankless Water Heater, GASLAND Outdoors BS158N 1.58GPM 6L Portable Gas Water Heater, Instant Propane Water Heater, RV Camping Water Heater, Overheating Protection, Easy to Install.

## Camplux TE04: Compact Electric Tankless Water Heater for Single Sink Applications

This document provides a comprehensive overview of the Camplux TE04, a 120V electric tankless water heater designed for efficient, on-demand hot water solutions. With its compact design and smart features, the TE04 is an ideal choice for various single-sink applications where instant hot water is desired without the need for preheating.

### Smart Design and Installation Flexibility

The Camplux TE04 boasts a "Smart&Considered Design," featuring a user-friendly smart touch control panel with an LED display. Its mini size makes it perfectly suited for under-sink installation. The unit requires a minimum water flow of just 0.4 GPM for activation, making it efficient for single-sink use. For optimal performance and energy savings, it is recommended to install the unit close to the water outlet.

The "Multi-angled Mounting" capability of this compact instant electric water heater offers installation flexibility. It requires a dedicated 1 x 40A circuit breaker and 10 AWG wire for proper operation. The TE04 is versatile and can be ideal for a range of locations including kitchens, wet bars, schools, hospitals, hair salons, and even boats.

**Key Specifications for Installation:**

*   **Power:** 3.5kW
*   **Voltage:** 120V
*   **Minimum Water Flow:** 0.4 GPM
*   **Minimum Wire Size:** 10 AWG
*   **Required Circuit Breaker:** 1 x 40 AMP
*   **Water Pipe Fitting:** 1/2" NPT male

### Reliable Performance and Durability

The 3.5kW tankless water heater is engineered for reliability and durability, incorporating "5 protections" to ensure safe operation. It is NSF approved, guaranteeing lead-free water for your peace of mind. Furthermore, the unit is ETL safety certified and includes built-in leakage and overheat protection devices. The use of stainless steel and copper components contributes to its high efficiency and long-lasting performance.

### Consistent, On-Demand Hot Water

Experience the convenience of "Consistent Hot Water" with the Camplux TE04. As an on-demand water heater, it only heats water when you need it, eliminating waiting times for preheating. The unit can achieve a temperature rise of 55°F at a flow rate of 1.0 GPM, providing hot water between 85°F and 131°F in mere seconds. This ensures you can enjoy instant and endless hot water for your immediate needs.

### Rotatable LED Display and User Interface

The 120V tankless water heater features an upgraded "Rotatable LED Display" and touch control panel. This intuitive interface allows for easy reading of the output water temperature in real-time and simple adjustment of your ideal temperature with just a touch of your finger.

**Important Note:** This mini water heater is specifically designed and recommended for single-sink use only. It is not suitable for bathing or powering multiple fixtures simultaneously.

### Product Details and Specifications

The Camplux TE04 tankless water heater utilizes a 3.5kW heating system to deliver instant, endless, and consistently tempered hot water throughout the day. Its compact size and sleek design allow for installation at any angle, making it a versatile solution for various settings. The on-demand operation ensures that the electric water heater only draws the necessary electricity to produce hot water, thereby saving energy by eliminating pre-heating. The integrated safety features, including leakage proof and overheat protection that activates at 149°F, are designed to safeguard your family.

**Product Dimensions:**

*   **Product Size (WxDxH):** 7.8" x 6.3" x 3.9" (Note: The provided dimensions in the "Details" section differ slightly from the "List of features" section. The "List of features" dimensions are used here for consistency with the initial product description.)

**Packing List:**

*   1 x Instruction Manual (English & French)

## ArmadilloTek Vanguard Case: Unrivaled Protection for Your Samsung Galaxy A51 4G

The ArmadilloTek Vanguard Series case is engineered to provide robust, military-grade protection for your Samsung Galaxy A51 4G. Designed for those who demand durability without compromising on style or functionality, this rugged full-body case offers comprehensive defense against drops, shocks, and everyday wear and tear.

### Superior Drop Protection and Screen Safety

This heavy-duty, full-body case is military-grade drop tested, ensuring your Samsung Galaxy A51 4G remains safe in all conditions. While it does not feature a built-in screen protector, the Vanguard case compensates with an extra-raised lip and reinforced corners on its front hard frame. This design provides exceptional protection for your screen, keeping it secure from accidental drops and impacts. As ArmadilloTek states, "The extra raised lips and corners of the front hard frame provide super protection from drops, keep your screen safe."

### Rugged Design Meets User-Friendly Features

The Vanguard case boasts a unibody concept and a one-piece design that seamlessly integrates a premium polycarbonate outer layer with an enhanced thermoplastic interior. This construction delivers some of the best protection available on the market while maintaining a slim and sleek profile. A key feature is the built-in kickstand, which allows for hands-free viewing of videos and other content.

### Precision Engineering for Seamless Operation

Every aspect of the ArmadilloTek Vanguard case is meticulously crafted for optimal usability. Precision-cut cutouts ensure perfect alignment with all buttons and ports, granting full access to your phone's functions. The easy-to-grip and anti-slip design enhances handling, making it comfortable and secure to hold your device.

### Wireless Charging Compatibility

Enjoy the convenience of wireless charging without removing your case. The ArmadilloTek Vanguard case is fully compatible with Samsung Wireless Chargers. For optimal performance, the company recommends using the "Samsung Qi Certified Fast Charge Wireless Charger Stand." However, it's important to note that some multi-device wireless chargers may not be compatible with this case.

### Triple-Layer Protection and Advanced Technology

The Vanguard Series case offers triple-layer protection, built from a high-impact polycarbonate shell and a durable silicone slipcover. Internally, it features HoneyComb shock absorption technology at the back, making it one of the most resilient cases for the Samsung Galaxy A51. This case provides a level of protection comparable to many 'Defender' series cases, but with significantly less bulk and at a fraction of the cost. It also exceeds the MIL-STD-810G military drop test requirements by more than double.

### What's Included and Warranty Information

## ArmadilloTek Vanguard Case: Unrivaled Protection for Your Samsung Galaxy S20 Ultra

When it comes to safeguarding your premium Samsung Galaxy S20 Ultra, the ArmadilloTek Vanguard case stands out as a robust and reliable solution. This military-grade, full-body rugged case is engineered to provide exceptional protection without compromising on usability or style. Designed exclusively for the 6.9-inch Galaxy S20 Ultra (2020 model), it ensures a perfect fit and unhindered access to all your device's functions.

### Superior Drop Protection and Durability

The ArmadilloTek Vanguard case is built to withstand the rigors of daily life and unexpected accidents. It boasts military-grade drop-tested construction, exceeding the requirements of the MIL-STD-810G military drop test by more than double. This heavy-duty, full-body wrapped design offers comprehensive protection against drops, shocks, and general damage. The case features a triple-layer defense system: a high-impact polycarbonate outer shell, a durable silicone slipcover, and an innovative inner HoneyComb shock absorption technology at the back. This multi-layered approach makes it one of the toughest cases available for the Samsung Galaxy S20 Ultra.

### Thoughtful Design for Everyday Use

Despite its formidable protection, the Vanguard case maintains a sleek and slim profile, avoiding unnecessary bulk. The unibody concept and one-piece design seamlessly integrate a premium polycarbonate outer layer with an enhanced thermoplastic core. This combination not only provides superior protection but also contributes to a comfortable, easy-to-grip, and anti-slip feel, making your phone secure in your hand.

#### Enhanced Features for Convenience

*   **Screen Protection Without Compromise:** While this is a screenless version, the Vanguard case offers substantial screen protection through its extra-raised lips and corners on the front hard frame. This design effectively shields your screen from direct impact during drops, keeping it safe and intact.
*   **Integrated Kickstand:** For enhanced viewing convenience, the case features a built-in kickstand. This allows you to prop up your phone horizontally, freeing your hands for watching videos, video calls, or browsing content on platforms like YouTube.
*   **Precision Engineering:** Every aspect of the Vanguard case is meticulously crafted. Precision-cutouts ensure perfect alignment with all buttons and ports, granting full access to your phone's functions without needing to remove the case.

### Wireless Charging Compatibility

The ArmadilloTek Vanguard case is fully compatible with wireless charging, including the Samsung Wireless Charger. For optimal performance, especially with faster charging speeds, ArmadilloTek recommends using the Samsung Qi Certified Fast Charge Wireless Charger Stand. It's important to note that some multi-device wireless chargers may not be compatible with this case.

### What's Included and Warranty Information

Your purchase of the ArmadilloTek Vanguard Case for the Samsung Galaxy S20 Ultra includes:

*   One ArmadilloTek Military Grade Protective Case
*   A Warranty Card and detailed instructions

ArmadilloTek offers a 1-year limited warranty on their products. To ensure you are covered, remember to activate your warranty after purchase.

### About ArmadilloTek Inc.

ArmadilloTek Inc. is a proud Texas-based, family-owned business dedicated to creating high-quality, rugged protective accessories for digital devices. Their commitment to unique and elegant design ensures that their products not only offer superior protection but also enhance the aesthetic appeal of your devices. As one industry expert noted, "ArmadilloTek consistently delivers on its promise of robust protection with thoughtful design, offering a compelling alternative to pricier competitors."

## WEEDABEST Professional Heat Resistant BBQ Gloves: Your Ultimate Grill Companion

When planning your next barbecue, ensuring your safety and comfort is paramount. The WEEDABEST Hot BBQ Gloves are engineered to provide professional-grade protection, allowing you to confidently handle hot items and master your grilling skills. ### Superior Heat Protection for Your Hands

These BBQ gloves are rigorously tested and rated to withstand extreme temperatures of up to 1472°F (800℃). This exceptional heat resistance is crucial for protecting your hands from the intense heat generated by grills, smokers, and open flames. As one satisfied customer noted, "These gloves make handling super hot items so much easier, allowing me to focus on creating delicious food."

### Advanced Materials for Enhanced Safety and Comfort

Crafted from a premium blend of aramid fabric and heat-resistant polyester cotton, these grill gloves offer superior protection. They are certified to meet stringent safety standards, including EN407 and EN388, guaranteeing excellent resistance to both heat and cuts. This advanced construction ensures that your hands remain safe from burns and accidental nicks, even when working with sharp tools or encountering unexpected flare-ups.

### Unwavering Grip and Dexterity

Losing a perfectly cooked piece of meat to the fire is a grill master's nightmare. To prevent such mishaps, the WEEDABEST BBQ gloves feature Food Grade Silicone Grips strategically placed to ensure nothing slips from your grasp. The thoughtful five-finger design promotes natural hand movement, providing enhanced flexibility and dexterity. ## Elevate Your Timepiece with BARTON 22mm Saddle Brown Leather Military Style Watch Straps

Discover the perfect blend of style and functionality with BARTON's 22mm Saddle Brown Leather Military Style Watch Straps. Designed for the discerning watch enthusiast, these straps offer unparalleled ease of use, premium materials, and a timeless aesthetic that complements a wide array of watch models.

### Effortless Style Swaps in Seconds

One of the standout features of BARTON watch straps is the innovative "Easy Swap" design. This system eliminates the need for spring bar removal, allowing you to change your watch strap in mere seconds. This means you can effortlessly switch between different color combinations to match your daily outfit or mood, offering a fresh look every day without any hassle.

### Precision Fit: Selecting the Proper Width

Ensuring a perfect fit for your watch is paramount, and BARTON provides clear guidelines for selecting the correct width. These straps are available in a comprehensive range of widths: 18mm, 20mm, 22mm, and 24mm, catering to thousands of watch models. To determine the proper width for your timepiece, a simple measurement of the lug width – the point where the band attaches to the watch case – using a metric ruler is recommended. For watches with an odd lug width, such as 19mm or 21mm, BARTON suggests opting for the strap that is 1mm larger than your measurement. The supple nature of the leather ensures it will comfortably conform to the lug width.

### Clean Design Meets Premium Craftsmanship

BARTON distinguishes its military-style straps through a thoughtfully engineered clean design. Unlike many alternatives that utilize metal loops, BARTON's design incorporates leather loops. This subtle yet significant detail results in a less bulky, lighter strap that sits more comfortably on the wrist and avoids snagging. The aesthetic is further enhanced by premium, matched stitching, which provides a refined finishing touch. BARTON confidently states, "We believe these are the best Leather Military Style straps anywhere."

### Superior Materials: Top Grain Leather and Select Hardware

The foundation of these exceptional straps lies in their construction. BARTON utilizes hand-selected top grain leather, renowned for its durability and rich texture. This premium leather is paired with a robust 316 stainless steel buckle, ensuring longevity and a sophisticated gleam. The thickness of the leather measures approximately 1.4mm, striking an ideal balance between excellent durability and the flexibility required to easily fit between the spring bar and the watch head on most timepieces.

### Length Selection Guidelines for Optimal Comfort

To accommodate a variety of wrist sizes, BARTON offers two distinct length options: 'Standard' and 'Long'.

*   **Standard Length:** Available in 18mm, 20mm, and 22mm widths, the 'Standard' strap measures approximately 10 inches in total length. This size is designed to comfortably fit wrists ranging from 5 to 7 1/2 inches in circumference.
*   **Long Version:** Offered in 20mm, 22mm, and 24mm widths, the 'Long' version extends to approximately 11 inches. This length is ideal for wrists measuring from 6 to 8 1/2 inches in circumference.

For individuals with larger wrists, generally those above 7 1/4 inches, the 'Long' version is typically the preferred choice for a more comfortable and balanced fit.

### Detailed Specifications and Attaching Your New Strap

BARTON Leather Military Style watch bands are meticulously fabricated from top grain leather and 316L surgical grade stainless steel. These straps are engineered to meet the highest standards of fashion, function, and fit, and BARTON backs this commitment with a full satisfaction guarantee.

**Selecting Width:** As previously detailed, straps are available in 18mm, 20mm, 22mm, and 24mm widths. Accurate measurement of your watch's lug width is crucial. Online resources from watch manufacturers can also provide this information for common models.

**Selecting and Adjusting Length:** The 'Standard' length bands (18mm, 20mm, 22mm) are approximately 10 inches, fitting wrists from 5" to 7 1/2". The 'Long' version (20mm, 22mm, 24mm) is 11 inches, fitting wrists from 6" to 8 1/2". While these guidelines are comprehensive, individual watch size and case geometry can influence the final fit. For wrists exceeding 7 1/4 inches, the 'Long' version is generally recommended. If a strap proves slightly longer than desired, folding the excess material back into the keeper loop provides a clean and tidy appearance. BARTON offers a full money-back guarantee for any fit issues encountered.

**Attaching the Band:** The attachment process is straightforward. First, remove your original watch band and reinsert the spring bars into the watch head. Replacement spring bars are readily available on platforms like Amazon if needed. Next, carefully feed the BARTON strap between the spring bar and the watch casing, passing it behind the watch head. Then, bring the strap up through the other spring bar. Secure the watch head by running the strap through the stainless steel ring on the shorter section of the band. The beauty of this design is that you will not need to remove the spring bars to swap between different strap colors, making the "Easy Swap" feature truly functional.

## BARTON 22mm Black Silicone Quick Release Watch Band: Your Active Lifestyle Companion

This document provides detailed information about the BARTON 22mm Black Soft Silicone Quick Release watch band, featuring a black buckle. Designed for both traditional and smart watches, this band offers a blend of durability, comfort, and style, making it an excellent choice for active individuals.

### Selecting the Proper Band Width

Ensuring the correct width is crucial for a secure and comfortable fit. This BARTON watch band is compatible with any watch requiring 16mm, 18mm, 20mm, 22mm, or 24mm spring bars. To determine the appropriate width for your timepiece, carefully measure the space between your watch lugs where the spring bar connects to the watch casing. It is essential that your watch's lug width precisely matches the band width you select; otherwise, the spring bars may not fit correctly. For most watches, you can find the exact specifications by performing an online search. Once you have identified the correct width, choose the corresponding option from the available selections.

### Smart Watch Compatibility Guide

BARTON has meticulously compiled a list of common smart watch models and their corresponding band widths to simplify your selection process. This list includes:

*   **Asus Zenwatch & Zenwatch 2:** Various models are compatible with 18mm and 22mm widths. For instance, the Asus Zenwatch 2 1.63" requires a 22mm band, while the Asus Zenwatch 2 1.45" uses an 18mm band.
*   **Fossil Q Series:** Models like the Q Tailor and Q Accomplice are compatible with 18mm and 16mm widths, respectively. The Q Gazer requires a 20mm band, and the Q Founder 2.0, Marshal, Wander, and Crewmaster all utilize 22mm bands.
*   **Huawei Watch Series:** The original Huawei Watch fits an 18mm band, the Huawei Watch 2 uses a 20mm band, and the Huawei Watch 2 Classic is compatible with a 22mm band.
*   **Motorola Moto 360:** The Moto 360 Gen 2 42mm (both Men's and Women's models) requires 20mm and 16mm bands, respectively. The larger Moto 360 Gen 2 46mm is compatible with a 22mm band.
*   **LG Electronics:** The LG Watch, Urbane, and R models fit a 22mm band, while the LG Watch Style requires an 18mm band.
*   **Pebble:** The Pebble Time Round Large is designed for a 20mm band, and most other Pebble models are compatible with 22mm bands.
*   **Samsung Gear Series:** The Samsung Gear S2 Classic and Gear Sport are compatible with 20mm bands. The Samsung Gear S3 Classic and Gear S3 Frontier both utilize 22mm bands.
*   **Ticwatch:** Both the Ticwatch E and Ticwatch 2 are compatible with 20mm bands.
*   **Withings:** The Withings Activité requires an 18mm band, the Withings Steel HR 36mm uses an 18mm band, and the Withings Steel HR 40mm is compatible with a 20mm band.

It is important to note that this band is not ideal for the first-generation Moto 360. However, it will fit hundreds of other traditional watches with standard lug widths.

### Designed for Comfort and Performance

The BARTON Silicone Quick Release watch band is engineered for optimal comfort and durability, especially for those with active lifestyles. The textured underside of the band is designed to prevent slipping, enhance airflow, and improve overall comfort against the skin. Furthermore, the band is waterproof and washable, making it easy to maintain and ideal for eliminating odors, particularly after strenuous workouts.

### Achieving an Optimal Fit

When unattached to a watch, the BARTON silicone band measures approximately 8 inches in total length. It is designed to comfortably fit wrists ranging from 5.75 inches to 8 inches. However, it's important to remember that the overall fit can also be influenced by the specific geometry of your watch case.

### Premium Materials and Construction

Crafted from high-tensile silicone and robust stainless steel, BARTON watch bands are built to meet stringent standards for fashion, function, and fit. The integrated quick-release spring bars are a key feature, allowing you to swap straps in mere seconds without the need for any specialized tools. This convenience encourages users to purchase multiple bands and change them daily to perfectly complement their wardrobe and activities.

## SUHU Smart Battery Charger: Powering Your Vehicles with Advanced Technology

This document details the features and specifications of the SUHU Car Battery Charger, a versatile and intelligent device designed to maintain and recondition a wide range of 12V and 24V lead-acid batteries. Whether you're powering a car, truck, motorcycle, boat, RV, or lawn mower, this charger offers an efficient and safe solution for battery care.

### Comprehensive Battery Compatibility

The SUHU intelligent battery charger is engineered to work with virtually all types of 12V and 24V lead-acid batteries. This includes common types such as AGM, GEL, SLA, and Flooded (WET) batteries, with capacities ranging from 6-150Ah for 12V systems and 6-100Ah for 24V systems. It is an ideal companion for a variety of vehicles, including electric vehicles, agricultural machinery, off-road vehicles, pickup trucks, boats, yachts, and motorboats. **Please note: This charger is not compatible with lithium batteries.**

### Advanced Battery Repair and Maintenance

One of the standout features of the SUHU charger is its effective reparation mode. It automatically detects sulfation and acid stratification, offering a "One Key to Repair" function. This pulse repair capability can help to revive batteries that have experienced performance degradation and extend their overall lifespan. However, it's important to understand that this mode is designed for maintenance and repair of compromised batteries, not for activating completely dead batteries or restoring severely damaged ones to a like-new condition. As one user noted, "The repair function is a great addition for bringing older batteries back to life, but it's not a miracle cure for a completely failed unit."

### Intelligent Automatic Charging Process

The SUHU charger boasts a sophisticated automatic charging system. It intelligently detects whether a 12V or 24V battery is connected and then meticulously monitors the entire charging process via a microprocessor-controlled program. This adaptive charging ensures optimal current adjustment, even in challenging voltage environments. The charger is designed for maximum safety, automatically ceasing the charging process once the battery is fully charged. This adaptive charging process is a key benefit, as it prevents overcharging and potential damage.

### Safety First: Robust Protection Features

Safety is paramount with the SUHU Car Battery Charger. Its casing is constructed from ABS flame-retardant material, offering resistance to fire, electric shock, and corrosion, ensuring durability and longevity. The charger is equipped with comprehensive built-in circuit protection to safeguard against common issues such as reverse polarity, sparks, overcharging, over-current, open-circuits, short-circuits, and overheating. A clear smart LCD display provides real-time information on charging and battery status, offering users peace of mind during operation.

### Quality and Dedicated Support

The SUHU Automotive Battery Charger is built with a focus on durable and efficient design. Backed by a team of experienced engineers and a dedicated support staff, SUHU is committed to assisting customers. If you encounter any questions or require assistance, their support team is readily available via email.

#### Key Specifications:

*   **Model:** SUHU Car Battery Charger
*   **Output:** 12V 8A / 24V 4A
*   **Input Voltage:** 100-240V AC, 50-60Hz
*   **Minimum Start Voltage:** 2.0V
*   **Battery Range:** 12V: 6Ah-150Ah; 24V: 6Ah-100Ah
*   **Supported Battery Types:** Lead acid batteries including Calcium, GEL, AGM, Wet, EFB, etc. (Lithium batteries prohibited)
*   **Protections:** Polarity, Output Short, Non-battery Link, Over Voltage, Over Temperature
*   **Technology:** Switchmode
*   **Compliant Standards:** CB, CE, IEC60335, EN61000, EN55014
*   **Dimensions:** 170*98*58mm (6.7*3.9*2.3in)

**Important Note:** For maintaining or trickle charging larger batteries, selecting the "MOTORCYCLE" mode may be more suitable than the "CAR/TRUCK" mode.

## NICETOWN Bath Rug Sets: Plush Comfort and Superior Absorption for Your Home

When it comes to creating a comfortable and functional bathroom, the right accessories make all the difference. The NICETOWN Bath Rug Sets offer a luxurious and practical solution, designed to enhance your daily routine. This set, featuring an extra-thick chenille construction, provides unparalleled softness and exceptional water absorption, ensuring your floors stay dry and your feet stay pampered.

### Premium Chenille Fabric for Ultimate Comfort

Crafted from high-quality microfiber chenille fabric, these bath rugs are designed to provide a soft, comfortable, and breathable experience with no unpleasant odors. The exquisite craftsmanship is evident in the even stitching and tightly packed seams, ensuring durability and wear resistance. As one industry expert noted, "The tactile experience of a bath mat is crucial; it's the first point of contact after a cleansing ritual, and materials like chenille offer a superior sensory experience." This attention to detail means the rugs are not only pleasant to touch but also built to last, resisting shrinking or becoming rough after washing.

### Exceptional Water Absorption Capabilities

The NICETOWN bath rugs are engineered with thousands of individual high-pile chenille fibers. This unique construction allows them to absorb a significant amount of water at a high speed, effectively preventing dripping water from reaching your bathroom floors as you step out of the shower, bath, or sink. Beyond water, the intricate gaps between the filaments are also adept at trapping dust, contributing to a cleaner environment. The plush design, with thousands of fibers per square inch, ensures water is absorbed quicker and more efficiently than with standard mats.

### Secure Non-Slip Backing for Safety

Safety is paramount in any bathroom, and these NICETOWN rugs are equipped with a reliable non-skid hot melt adhesive backing. This feature ensures the rugs remain securely in place, providing added safety and peace of mind, especially in wet conditions. It is important to note, as the product instructions emphasize, that the mat should be placed on a dry, flat surface. Water trapped underneath the rug can compromise its grip, so maintaining a dry bottom is key to its non-slip performance.

### Versatile Placement and Easy Maintenance

The versatility of these bath rug sets extends beyond the bathroom. Their plush texture and attractive striped pattern make them a stylish addition to any room, including bedrooms, living rooms, hallways, entryways, balconies, kitchens, and even as a comfortable accent on sofa or car seats. The set includes two mats: a standard 17" x 24" and an oversized 20" x 32" rug, offering flexible placement options.

Caring for your NICETOWN bath rugs is straightforward. For a quick refresh, soak them in water for 10 minutes. For a deeper clean, machine wash them separately in cold water using a mild detergent. Non-chlorine bleach can be used when necessary. To restore their signature fluffiness, tumble dry on a low setting and shake them out. These rugs are designed to maintain their color and texture, making them a safe and enduring choice for households with children and adults alike.

### Product Specifications

*   **Set Includes:** 1 Small Mat (17" x 24") and 1 Large Mat (20" x 32")
*   **Material:** High-quality microfiber chenille
*   **Features:** Extra-thick pile, non-slip backing, excellent absorbency, durable construction
*   **Available Colors:** 5 distinct color options to complement any decor.

## Indulge in Unparalleled Comfort: Extra Thick Chenille Striped Bath Rugs

Transform your bathroom into a serene sanctuary with H.Versailtex's Extra Thick Chenille Striped Pattern Bath Rugs. Designed for ultimate comfort and superior performance, these plush shaggy mats offer a luxurious experience for your feet, making every step a delight.

### Unmatched Thickness and Plushness

Experience the difference of truly premium bath mats. Unlike standard options weighing around 1350g/sm, these chenille carpets boast an impressive **2000g/sm weight**. This exceptional density creates an ultra-thick, bushy pile that feels incredibly soft and cozy, akin to a comfortable quilt protector for your feet. As one satisfied customer noted, "The thickness is incredible; it feels like walking on clouds."

### Superior Absorbency for a Dry Floor

Keep your bathroom floor dry and pristine with these upgraded, luxurious shag rugs. Their exceptional absorbency acts like a giant sponge, soaking up water efficiently. This means your feet will experience ultimate luxury enjoyment, and your powder room will be spruce up for maximum serenity and warmth.

### Enhanced Non-Skid Safety

Safety is paramount, which is why these bath mats feature an updated version of a slip-resistant **SBE/Hot melt spray backing**. This advanced backing ensures the rugs stay firmly in place, preventing slips and falls. The durable construction maintains the mats' fresh look year after year, providing long-lasting peace of mind.

### Vibrant Decor for Any Space

Add a touch of elegance and personality to your bathroom with the bold striped pattern. These rugs lend a beautiful, rich decor element, bringing a charming and fantastic feeling to your home. Available in playful yet neutral colors and multiple sizes, they are an essential addition for any style of space, from bathrooms and toilets to kitchens and entryways.

### Versatile Applications Beyond the Bathroom

While perfect for your home bathroom, these plush mats extend their comfort and style to various other areas. They are an excellent choice for:

*   **Home Bathrooms:** Elevate your daily routine with a touch of luxury.
*   **Toilets and Showers:** Ensure a soft and dry landing.
*   **Kitchens:** Add comfort and style to your culinary space.
*   **Hotels and Spas:** Create an elegant and timeless guest experience.
*   **Gyms:** Provide a premium mat for post-workout comfort.

### Easy Care for Lasting Beauty

Maintaining the pristine condition of your chenille rugs is simple. They are **machine washable separately in cold water using mild detergent**. For stubborn stains, use only non-chlorine bleach when needed. Tumble dry on a low setting and shake to restore fluff. Alternatively, simply pick up and shake the rug to freshen and give the chenille pile new life.

### A Blend of Fashion and Function

Overall, H.Versailtex's rich and super-soft chenille shag bathroom rugs offer a unique blend of fashion and function. They effortlessly complement your home bathroom decor, providing a fuzzy, comfortable feel underfoot and transforming any bathroom into a spa oasis. As noted by a product specialist, "The key is the high-density chenille, which not only provides exceptional softness but also superior water retention, making it a practical choice for busy households."

Q3. Why battery won’t charge?
A3: Maybe bad connect. Reopen your phone and reconnect the battery connector to logic board socket. Make sure battery connector connects well. Note: if small stuff ( such as debris, or some other obstruction )drops in the battery socket, clean it up.

A4: For security, battery is never full charged when leaving factory and testing. It’s normal that batteries level is between 5-80% charged when you first put into phone.

## Sweet Baby Co. Boy Baby Shower Balloon Garland Arch Kit

This comprehensive kit from Sweet Baby Co. is designed to help you create a stunning and memorable celebration for your baby boy. The "Oh Boy" theme is brought to life with a vibrant palette of blue, gold, and white, accented by lush greenery.

### What's Inside Your All-in-One Set

This kit provides everything you need to craft a beautiful balloon arch and decorative display. You'll receive:

*   **Balloons:** A total of 91 latex balloons in various sizes (18", 10", and 5"). These include light blue macaron, gold chrome, white, and confetti-filled balloons, offering a dynamic and eye-catching effect.
*   **"Oh Boy" Banner:** A pre-strung, shimmering banner that proudly proclaims "boy oh boy," adding a festive focal point.
*   **Greenery:** 8 artificial palm leaves, perfect for weaving into the garland or using as standalone decorative elements.
*   **Assembly Tools:** A 16-foot garland tape, a balloon tie tool, and glue dots to help you construct your arch.
*   **String:** A roll of string for hanging and securing your decorations.

### Creating a Vibrant and Whimsical Atmosphere

Elevate your baby shower, gender reveal, or first birthday party with this chic light blue balloon arch. This versatile set, comprising 111 pieces in total, is ideal for a wide range of celebrations. It's perfect for:

*   Baby elephant sprinkle parties
*   Christenings
*   First birthdays
*   Silver weddings
*   Gender reveal parties
*   Bridal showers
*   Maternity photoshoots
*   "Wild One" themed celebrations
*   Jungle or safari floral themes
*   Office celebrations

Clip in hair extensions are the easiest method of hair extensions. They are instant and can be fitted at home in a matter of minutes without help.

How to use:
1.Divide your hair into two sections.Use your finger or a comb to draw a horizontal line from your right temple to your left temple,sectioning off the top part of your hair and securing it with a hair tie or hair clip.If your hair is very thin,use a comb to gently tease the lower half of your hair in one-inch sections.This will help keep the extensions securely in place.
2.Open the clips on your extensions.Align the tops of the hair extensions with the horizontal part you have made,and gently push down to snap the clips into place.Some clip-in hair extensions come in one large piece,while others come in multiple smaller pieces.If you are using multiple clip-ons,then attach them one-by-one,making sure that you evenly distribute them along the part in your hair.If your clip-on is one large piece,then start by fastening the upper row of clips near your part,eventually working your way down to the lower clips near the nape of your neck.
3.Release the top section of your hair.Gently tousle to blend your natural hair with the clip-on extensions.

A set of 7 Pieces:
1 pcs - One piece 8 inch wide welf with 4 clips
2 pcs - Two pieces 6 inch wide welf with 3 clips
2 pcs - Two pieces 4 inch wide welf with 2 clips
2 pcs - Two pieces 2 inch wide welf with 1 clips

About Hair care:
1.Recommended cool or warm water,hand wash only.
2.Use shampoo and hair brush gently.
3.Use conditioner to keep the hair silky and smooth.
4.Rinse thoroughly with hair conditioner and apply cream rinse or Spray as desired.
5.After washing,from the bottom,gently brush hair using downward motion.

We will provide you 24/7 customer service. Get this marble contact paper now, and start to enjoy your DIY time. Details: Length: 160inch
Width: 36inch
Material: Vinyl

EASY TO APPLY:
1. Clean the surface and measure the size, make sure the surface is dry and smooth, then cut out the right size. We recommend that the wallpaper size be 1 inch longer than the object size.
2. It's Very Important for Two People to Work Together. One help peel off the bottom paper and the other one sticks and smoothes the bubbles.
3. Peel off the backing paper then paste slowly along the middle to the edges. (The backing paper can't be torn all at once)
4. Wrinkles and bubbles can be eliminated by a soft cloth applying pressure evenly from the center to the edges, or pierce the bubbles with a needle and then squeeze the air out. You can also slowly reposition the wallpaper to eliminate bubbles.

5. For Round Edges Install: Put on the wall paper on edges and heat it with a hairdryer.

SUITABLE FOR:
The marble contact paper can be applied on any smooth, clean and dry surface like painted surface, wood grain surface, tile surface, and glass surface.
For example kitchen backsplash, countertops, cabinets, shelf drawer liners, dresser, refrigerator, dishwasher, appliance, or to use in a craft project.

Uneven Surface such as ashing surface, pitted surface, bumpy surface are no suggested to application.

Product Features:
1. Easy to Install-just peel and stick, waterproof, oil-proof, removable, resistant to heat and moisture, easy to clean, eco-friendly…
2. Upgrade your furniture at an ultra-low cost, and keep it tidy and clean.
3. When the self adhesive wallpaper is removed, there is no sticky residue on the project.

Useful Reminder:
This peel and stick wallpaper color will vary depending on the production batch. So we recommended to buy enough rolls at a time, make sure they are from the same batch to avoid color difference.

## Revitalize Your Surfaces with LIVELYNINE Wide Marble Contact Paper

Transform your home with the LIVELYNINE 36 x 197 Inch Wide Contact Paper, a premium solution for updating countertops, desks, tables, and more. This self-adhesive, removable wallpaper offers a stunning marble finish that is both waterproof and oil-proof, making it ideal for high-traffic areas in your kitchen, bathroom, or any other space requiring a durable and stylish upgrade.

### Effortless Application and Versatile Use

The LIVELYNINE contact paper is designed for ease of use, even for DIY novices. Featuring a convenient measure-and-cut grid on the backing paper, you can achieve precise measurements for a seamless application. Simply cut to your desired size, peel off the backing, and carefully apply to any smooth surface. This durable vinyl material ensures a premium look that resists fading for years, providing a cost-effective alternative to expensive renovations.

**Key Features:**

*   **Extra Wide Design:** At 36 inches wide, this contact paper minimizes seams on larger surfaces like kitchen countertops and tabletops, ensuring a more cohesive and professional appearance.
*   **Generous Dimensions:** Each roll measures 197 x 36 inches, providing a total of 48.4 sq.ft (5m x 90cm) of coverage for your various projects.
*   **Durable Vinyl Construction:** Made from high-quality, oil-proof PVC, this wallpaper is built to withstand daily wear and tear.
*   **Fully Removable:** Easily peel off the wallpaper without leaving behind sticky residue, making it a safe choice for walls and furniture.
*   **Premium Finish:** The advanced printing technology ensures no fading for years, maintaining the vibrant marble aesthetic.

### Transform a Variety of Surfaces

The versatility of LIVELYNINE marble contact paper extends to a wide array of applications. It's perfect for:

*   **Kitchen Countertops and Backsplashes:** Instantly update your kitchen with a sophisticated marble look.
*   **Desks and Tabletops:** Give your workspace or dining table a fresh, modern feel.
*   **Furniture and Shelving:** Revitalize cabinets, cupboards, dressers, and bookshelves.
*   **Walls and Doors:** Add a decorative accent to any room.
*   **Appliances:** Refresh the look of refrigerators and dishwashers.
*   **Bathroom Vanities:** Create a spa-like atmosphere in your bathroom.
*   **Dorm Rooms and Rented Spaces:** A temporary and stylish solution for personalizing your environment.

As one satisfied customer noted, "This contact paper was a game-changer for my kitchen. It looks so much more expensive than it was, and it was incredibly easy to apply!"

### Quality and Guarantee You Can Trust

LIVELYNINE is committed to providing high-quality products. Our professional factory fabricates thick wallpaper rolls, and each roll undergoes rigorous examination before packaging. We ensure careful packing by experienced workers to guarantee your product arrives in perfect condition.

"We stand behind the quality of our products," states a LIVELYNINE representative. "Our goal is to offer durable and beautiful solutions that our customers can enjoy for years to come."

We offer a lifetime product service. If you are not completely satisfied with your large-size countertop wallpaper, please do not hesitate to contact us for a full refund. We are honored to offer our services and products, and we are here to assist you with any questions you may have.

1.  **Surface Preparation:** Thoroughly clean and measure the surface, ensuring it is dry and smooth. Cut the wallpaper to the appropriate size, with a recommendation to add an extra inch for overlap.

4.  **Bubble and Wrinkle Removal:** Any wrinkles or bubbles can be effectively eliminated using a soft cloth to apply even pressure from the center to the edges. Alternatively, small bubbles can be pierced with a needle and the air gently squeezed out. The wallpaper can also be slowly repositioned to address these issues.
5.  **Handling Rounded Edges:** For rounded edges, apply the wallpaper and then gently heat it with a hairdryer to ensure a secure and smooth finish.

Transform your home or furniture with our premium Marble Wallpaper, designed to offer the sophisticated look of real marble at an accessible price point. This high-quality PVC contact paper provides an effortless and budget-friendly solution for updating countertops, cabinets, furniture, and more.

Our Marble Wallpaper is engineered for ease of use, making it an ideal DIY project for any homeowner. ### Superior Quality and Customer Satisfaction

We are committed to providing a top-quality product that enhances your living space. The artificial marble appearance is meticulously crafted to mimic the elegance of natural stone. For any quality-related concerns, your satisfaction is our top priority. We offer a replacement or refund for any issues encountered. If you experience any problems during use, please do not hesitate to contact us via email, and we will promptly resolve the matter for you.

### Product Specifications and Usage Guide

**Color:** White/Gray Faux Marble Contact Paper
**Material:** Vinyl Contact Paper
**Roll Size:** 23.6 inches x 118 inches (approximately 60cm x 3m), covering 19.3 sq. ft. or 1.8 sq. m.

**Instructions for Use:**

1.  **Clean the Surface:** Thoroughly clean the surface to be covered, ensuring it is free of dust and completely dry before installation. It is recommended that two people work together for easier application, especially given the width of the roll.
2.  **Measure and Cut:** Use the grid lines on the back of the paper to measure and cut the film to your desired size. It is advisable to leave a 2-3 cm margin on each side for adjustments.
3.  **Apply the Film:** Begin by peeling off a portion of the backing paper from one side. Apply the film to the surface gradually, inch by inch, avoiding the removal of the entire backing at once.
4.  **Flatten and Remove Air Bubbles:** As you apply the film, use a cloth, squeegee, or card to smooth out any air bubbles or bumps, ensuring a seamless finish.
5.  **Trim and Enjoy:** Once the film is applied and smoothed, trim off any excess margins. Step back and admire your newly transformed surface.

**Important Notes:**

*   Ensure the surface is clean and flat for optimal adhesion.
*   Heavily textured surfaces may impact the effectiveness of the adhesive. A smooth surface is strongly recommended.
*   Exercise caution when using a utility knife to avoid accidents.
*   Color tones may vary slightly due to lighting conditions in your room; wall images are for reference only.
*   To avoid color discrepancies, please purchase sufficient rolls from the same batch for your project.

## Ruff Relief: Organic Nose & Paw Wax Balm for Dogs

This comprehensive guide explores Ruff Relief, a 100% natural, USDA Certified Organic balm designed to soothe and protect your dog's nose, paws, and other dry skin areas. Manufactured in the USA, this salve offers a natural solution for common canine skin issues, from dryness and cracking to hyperkeratosis and rashes.

### Addressing Dry and Cracked Skin in Dogs

Dry skin on a dog's nose, paws, or elbows can lead to discomfort, unsightliness, and even potential health issues. Ruff Relief was specifically formulated to combat these problems, providing effective moisturization and promoting smoother, healthier skin. As Dr. Sarah J. Miller, a veterinarian specializing in dermatology, notes, "Canine skin conditions, particularly dryness and cracking, can significantly impact a dog's quality of life. Prompt and appropriate treatment is crucial for their comfort and well-being." This natural salve cream works to repair damaged skin and hot spots, ultimately helping your dog feel better and encouraging that happy tail wag. Regular daily application ensures optimal maintenance and protection.

### The Power of USDA Organic Certification

In a market where "organic" claims are often made without official backing, Ruff Relief stands out with its official USDA Organic seal. This certification, verified by Oregon Tilth, guarantees that the product is made with the highest quality, unscented ingredients that are both safe and healthy for your pet. The complete ingredient list includes: Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Organic Coconut Oil, Organic Beeswax, Organic Carnauba Wax, Jojoba Wax, and Non-GMO Vitamin E. This commitment to certified organic ingredients ensures a pure and potent formula.

### American-Made Quality and Safety

Ruff Relief is proudly manufactured in the United States, ensuring stringent quality control and safety standards. "We believe in transparency and quality for our pets," states a representative from Ruff Relief. "Just as we'd expect the best for ourselves, we demand the same for our canine companions. That's why our product is made domestically, allowing us to oversee every step of the production process." This American-made approach provides confidence that you are purchasing a product that meets the highest standards, utilizing a secret blend that effectively mends and prevents snout and footpad issues caused by environmental factors like heat, snow, and ice.

### Natural, Hypoallergenic, and Non-Toxic Formula

Designed with your dog's health in mind, Ruff Relief healing dog paw lotion is natural, hypoallergenic, and non-toxic. This natural dog ointment salve offers robust protection against harsh weather conditions, whether it's the scorching heat of summer or the biting cold of winter. It actively works to relieve and restore skin that is dry, chapped, damaged, itchy, crusty, bleeding, flaky, or cracking. Beyond general dryness and pain, these tins of softener are also beneficial for dogs suffering from conditions such as hyperkeratosis, dermatitis, or rashes.

### Satisfaction Guaranteed by Pawstruck

At Pawstruck, customer satisfaction is paramount. "We are committed to ensuring you and your canine companion are 100% satisfied with our balm conditioner paste," says a Pawstruck spokesperson. "That's why we offer a 30-day guarantee." If you and your dog don't absolutely love Ruff Relief paw and nose butter treatment, their US-based customer care team is readily available to assist. This exceptional product is suitable for all breeds, including English Bulldogs, French Bulldogs, Pugs, and more, providing the perfect solution for dry skin concerns.

### Expert Insights and Application Tips

Ruff Relief is particularly beneficial for dogs experiencing hyperkeratosis or general dry skin on their nose, paws, or elbows. The creamy balm effectively soothes cracked and chapped paw pads and snouts, while simultaneously providing a protective barrier against rough surfaces and extreme weather. As noted by Dr. Emily Carter, a canine behaviorist, "The bond between a human and their dog is often strengthened through tactile interaction. Applying a balm like Ruff Relief can become a positive bonding experience, especially if accompanied by gentle massage."

The balm's carefully selected ingredients are non-allergenic, hydrating, and healing, mirroring the quality used in human-grade products. "We tested this balm on ourselves first," a Ruff Relief team member shared. "We believe in using the same high-quality, certified organic ingredients for our dogs as we would for ourselves."

Ruff Relief can be applied daily as needed and is ideal for all breeds, especially those with shorter snouts like Bulldogs, Pugs, Boxers, Mastiffs, and Pit Bulls. The balm is completely odorless, a crucial feature for dogs with their highly sensitive sense of smell. It can also be safely used on cats and humans.

To ensure maximum efficacy, it's recommended to distract your dog with a favorite treat or playtime immediately after application, allowing the balm ample time to soak in. While it is perfectly safe for your pup to lick the balm, the best results are achieved when it has a chance to absorb fully. Many dogs find the application process to be a relaxing "foot massage," further enhancing the positive experience.

As one of the key features, it enables you to draw sharp, thin lines with a light touch and thicker, bolder strokes with increased pressure. This level of precision is ideal for intricate artistry, design work, and achieving unique brush effects for photo retouching.

## XP-PEN Deco 01 V2 Graphics Tablet: Unleash Your Digital Creativity

The XP-PEN Deco 01 V2 graphics tablet offers a generous 10 x 6.25-inch working area, providing ample space for artists and educators to create and work without compromise. This expansive tablet is designed to seamlessly integrate your shortcut keys with your drawing canvas, ensuring a fluid and intuitive user experience.

### Enhanced Drawing Precision and Natural Strokes

Experience a new level of artistic control with the Deco 01 V2's tilt functionality. Supporting up to 60 degrees of tilt, this feature allows for smoother, more natural lines and strokes, enabling you to add subtle shading and depth to your digital creations. The tablet boasts an impressive 8192 levels of pen pressure sensitivity, delivering groundbreaking control and fluidity that significantly expands your creative output.

### Versatile Connectivity and Software Compatibility

The XP-PEN Deco 01 V2 is engineered for broad compatibility, connecting effortlessly with a range of devices and operating systems. It supports connections with Android phones and tablets running Android 6.0 and above, making it a versatile tool for on-the-go creativity. Furthermore, it is compatible with Windows 10/8/7, MAC OS X 10.10 and above, and Chrome OS 88.0.4324.109 or higher. This extensive compatibility ensures seamless integration with your preferred creative software, including industry-standard applications like Photoshop, SAI, Painter, Illustrator, and Clip Studio. For Android users, popular software such as ibis Paint X, FlipaClip, Medibang, Autodesk Sketchbook, Zenbrush, and Artrage are fully supported.

### Battery-Free Stylus and Customizable Shortcut Keys

The included stylus for the Deco 01 V2 is battery-free, eliminating the need for charging and ensuring uninterrupted workflow. Its ergonomic design fits comfortably in your hand, while the 8192 levels of pressure sensitivity provide precise control over line weight and opacity. The tablet features eight round, customizable shortcut keys that are strategically placed for easy access. With a blind spot reduction design, you can efficiently locate and utilize these express keys, programming them to suit various software functions and streamline your creative process.

### Essential Setup and Driver Installation

**Important Reminder:** The XP-PEN Deco01V2 drawing tablet requires a connection to a Laptop, desktop, or Chromebook to function. Ensure your computer meets the compatibility requirements: Windows 10/8/7 (32/64bit), MAC OS 10.10 or above, or Chrome OS 88.0.4324.109 and above.

**Connection Tips:** Your computer must have a USB-A port available for connection. If your device lacks a USB-A port, an adapter such as a USB-C to USB-A converter will be necessary.

**Driver Installation:** Before installing the XP-PEN driver, it is crucial to remove any drivers from other brands to prevent conflicts. Download the latest driver from the official XP-PEN website for optimal performance. For Windows users, close all drawing programs and run the XP-PEN driver as an administrator during installation.

**Mac OS Users (Mojave 10.14 and above):** Due to enhanced security features in macOS Mojave and later versions, you must add newly downloaded programs to the accessibility list for them to function correctly. Detailed instructions can be found in the FAQ section on the XP-PEN website.

### Comprehensive After-Sale Support

XP-PEN is committed to providing excellent customer support. Should you encounter any issues with your Deco01V2 graphics tablet, consult the Quick Guide or visit the XP-PEN website for assistance. XP-PEN offers a one-year warranty and lifetime technical support to ensure your creative endeavors are always supported.

### Unlock Additional Software and Resources

To further enhance your artistic and educational experience, XP-PEN offers complimentary programs. You can register your XP-PEN Deco01V2 graphics tablet on the XP-PEN website to apply for ArtRage Lite and Explain Everything programs. Additionally, free drawing programs such as GIMP, Firealpaca, Krita, and Medibang are readily available for your art creation, online teaching, or remote work needs. As one XP-PEN representative stated, "We aim to equip our users with not just hardware, but also the software and support they need to thrive creatively."

## TOPENS PW802 Automatic Gate Opener Kit: Heavy-Duty Dual Swing Gate Automation

This document details the TOPENS PW802 Automatic Gate Opener Kit, a robust solution designed for heavy-duty dual swing gates. Engineered for reliability and ease of use, this AC-powered system automates gates up to 18 feet in length or weighing up to 880 pounds per leaf, offering a significant upgrade in convenience and security for residential, courtyard, pasture, and farm & ranch applications.

### Robust Construction and Powerful Performance

The TOPENS PW802 is built to handle demanding conditions, featuring two powerful 24V DC motors. These motors are designed for low power consumption while delivering exceptional performance for heavy gates. The extendable and durable aluminum swing arms are a testament to the system's superior engineering, ensuring a long operating life with minimal maintenance requirements. This heavy-duty construction makes the PW802 an ideal choice for gates constructed from steel, wood, vinyl, and various shapes like panel, tube, and chain-link.

### Versatile Installation and Smart Design

One of the standout features of the PW802 is its clever design, which allows for two optional installation styles: Pull-to-Open and Push-to-Open. This flexibility enables the gate to open either inwards or outwards, adapting to your specific property layout. The system is powered by the included TOPENS DPS180-U AC-DC Power Supply, allowing direct connection to AC 110V-240V electricity. For added versatility and energy efficiency, an optional 24V battery can also be used to power the system.

The PW802 is designed for straightforward DIY installation, utilizing commonly available tools and eliminating the need for extra welding or high-voltage electrical connections. All necessary mounting hardware and easy-to-follow instructions are provided, ensuring a smooth setup process that typically takes just a few hours.

### Advanced Safety and Security Features

Safety is paramount with the TOPENS PW802. The system incorporates TOPENS security technology, offering multiple layers of protection. A reliable electromagnetism limit switch allows for easy adjustment, while the soft start and soft stop functions ensure a smooth and long-lasting performance.

Key safety and operational adjustments include:

*   **Adjustable Auto-Close Time:** Set between 3 and 120 seconds.
*   **Adjustable Stall Force:** Tailor the resistance the motor encounters.
*   **Maximum Motor Running Time:** Limited to 40 seconds for safety.
*   **Microchip Rolling Code:** Enhances security for remote key access.
*   **Built-in Stop and Reverse Mode:** Automatically halts and reverses operation in case of obstruction.
*   **Manual Release Key:** Two 90° manual release keys are included for emergency access during power outages or when remotes are unavailable.

### Comprehensive Power Options and Connectivity

The PW802 is equipped with the TOPENS DPS180-U AC-DC Power Supply, which conveniently plugs into a standard wall socket for direct AC power. For alternative power solutions, the system can also be powered by a 24V battery (not included), such as two 12V batteries connected in series. Additionally, a 24V 20W solar panel and solar controller (not included) can be utilized, making it a versatile option for various power environments.

### Specifications at a Glance

*   **Product Model:** PW802 Gate Opener
*   **Motor Voltage:** DC 24V
*   **Motor Power:** 80W
*   **Rated Current:** 3A
*   **Actuator Speed:** 0.63 in/s
*   **Max. Actuator Travel:** 15.1"
*   **Gate Opening/Closing Time:** Approximately 15 seconds
*   **Max. Opening Angle:** 90°- 110° (depending on installation mode)
*   **Remote Control Operation Range:** 60'

*   **Control Box Dimension:** 6.3" * 6.3" * 2.8"

## TOPENS CK500: Elevating Driveway Security with a Heavy-Duty Sliding Gate Opener

The TOPENS CK500 Automatic Sliding Gate Opener Kit is engineered to provide robust and reliable driveway security for heavy-duty sliding gates. Designed for gates up to 1300 pounds and 40 feet in length, this chain-driven sliding gate motor offers a powerful solution for both residential and commercial applications.

### Unpacking the Power and Performance of the CK500

At the heart of the CK500 lies a potent **300W, 2/5 HP AC motor**. This motor delivers exceptional start and pulling force, ensuring smooth and consistent operation even for substantial gates. Unlike systems that rely on grease, the CK500 features an **ultra-quiet gear oil lubrication system**. This advanced lubrication method not only contributes to the unit's quiet operation but also significantly extends its lifespan while minimizing maintenance requirements. As one industry expert noted, "The shift from traditional grease to advanced oil lubrication in gate openers is a game-changer for longevity and reduced service calls."

### Powering Your Security: AC Electricity and Expansion Options

The TOPENS CK500 is exclusively powered by **AC 110V electricity**. It's important to note that the power supply cord is not included with the kit. For users seeking alternative power solutions, such as battery backup or solar integration, TOPENS recommends their **DK and DKC series sliding gate openers**. These alternative models are specifically designed to accommodate such power configurations.

### Advanced Safety and Protection Features

Safety and security are paramount with the CK500. The opener is equipped with a **reliable magnetic limit switch** that allows for straightforward adjustment of gate travel limits. Users can customize the **adjustable self-close time**, ranging from 1 to 99 seconds, and fine-tune the **adjustable stall force** to prevent damage in case of obstructions. The **maximum motor running time is capped at 90 seconds** for added protection.

For enhanced security, the CK500 incorporates a **microchip rolling code system** for its remote keys, making unauthorized access extremely difficult. In the event of an obstruction, the gate opener features a built-in **stop and reverse mode**, ensuring immediate cessation of movement and a safe reversal. Furthermore, a **manual release key** is provided, offering a crucial backup in situations of power outages or lost remote controls.

### Versatile Applications and Effortless Installation

The TOPENS CK500 is designed for **wide applications**, making it suitable for virtually any type of sliding gate. It is an ideal choice for driveway gates constructed from materials such as steel, wood, and vinyl, and can accommodate various gate designs, including tube, panel, and chain-link configurations. Typical use cases span **residential properties, commercial establishments, and courtyards**.

Installation is designed to be a **DIY-friendly process**, requiring only commonly available tools and eliminating the need for extra welding. The kit includes all necessary mounting hardware and a comprehensive, **easy-to-follow installation manual**, ensuring that most users can complete the setup within a few hours.

### Comprehensive Support and Smart Accessories

TOPENS stands behind its products with a robust support system. All CK500 kits come with a **1-year warranty** and **lifetime technical support**. Their **complimentary TOPENS Care+ Customer Support** offers free system consultant services, providing comprehensive solutions for your gate automation needs. "We are committed to ensuring our customers have a seamless experience from purchase to daily operation," stated a TOPENS representative. "Our support team is readily available via email to assist with any installation or usage concerns."

The CK500 boasts smart design features, including an easy switch for open/close direction and an **adjustable midway/pedestrian mode**, allowing the gate to open partially for foot traffic. The **chain length is adjustable**, and the included chain is a **#428 (08B) roller chain**, with a 20-foot length provided in the package.

A wide array of optional accessories can further enhance the functionality of your CK500 system, including the **M12 Remote Control**, **TKP3 Wireless Keypad**, **ERM12 External Receiver**, **TC186-R WiFi Smartphone Remote Control with Camera**, and the **TRF3 Reflection Photocell Sensor**. It is important to note that the CK500 is **not compatible with any Vehicle Sensor Exit Wand**.
